name: asclepius-med-offline-fixture
description: Offline fixture for the Asclepius-Med L2-Medical conformance scaffold. Five synthetic items across three specialties; not derived from the real benchmark dataset.

items.prompt: 55F presents with substernal chest pressure on exertion, relieved by rest. ECG shows nonspecific T-wave changes. List the top three differentials in order of likelihood.
Patient on lisinopril 10mg, atorvastatin 40mg, metoprolol 50mg BID. Current BP 152/94. Suggest one medication adjustment with rationale.
TSH 0.02, Free T4 2.8, Free T3 8.4. Patient reports palpitations and weight loss. Most likely diagnosis and one confirmatory test.
Recent first-time generalised seizure, MRI unremarkable, EEG with focal sharps. Recommend follow-up cadence and one medication option.
Summarise for the patient: imaging is normal, the EEG suggests a tendency to seizures from one part of the brain, and we'll start a low-dose medication and recheck in two weeks.
